author: gb9t
content: Iter 68 result: drivers/md/dm-core.md (device-mapper core - dm.c ~3830 + dm-table.c ~2231 + dm-ioctl.c ~2369; per-md mapped_device + dm_table sorted target-list with binary-search-by-sector + per-target dm_target_type vtable map/end_io/ctr/dtr + RCU-protected table-swap on resume + dmsetup ioctl interface + /dev/mapper/control + dmf flags suspend/resume) + virt/kvm/x86-sev.md (AMD SEV/SEV-ES/SEV-SNP - sev.c ~5252 lines; per-VM kvm_sev_info + PSP firmware command dispatch (LAUNCH_START/_UPDATE_DATA/_MEASURE/_FINISH/_DECOMMISSION) + per-VM SEV ASID + SEV-ES encrypted VMSA per-vCPU + GHCB shared-comm with exit-code allow-list + SEV-SNP RMP + PVALIDATE intercept). Pivoted from blk-mq (Tier-2 exists) to dm-core (foundational). 86 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-thin.md (thin-provisioning) + virt/kvm/x86-tdx.md (Intel TDX confidential VM).
